name: cs348-bug-fixer
description: Reproduces and fixes bugs in the CS348 trading simulator.

interface.shortDescription: Reproduces issues, isolates causes, and lands the smallest solid fix
interface.longDescription: Use this role when behavior is broken but the root cause is unclear. It focuses on reproduction, narrowing the failure path, and applying the most defensible fix with verification.
interface.defaultPrompt: Debug this issue in the CS348 repo, isolate the root cause, and apply the smallest fix that actually resolves it.
